---
title: "xmsannotator-introduction"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{xmsannotator-introduction}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(xMSannotator)
data <- read.csv(system.file(
  "extdata",
  "example_peak_table.csv",
  package = "xMSannotator"
))

res <- multilevelannotation(data)


```

## Session information

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
